quests.title: Feed Dobbie Before 18:00
quests.description: His Highness demands his meal on time. No excuses.

quests.title: Clean the Litter Box
quests.description: The sacred ritual must be performed. Dobbie demands cleanliness.

quests.title: Pet Dobbie for 5 Minutes
quests.description: Five minutes of undivided attention. The minimum acceptable tribute.

quests.title: Interactive Play Session
quests.description: 10 minutes with the wand toy. Dobbie requires stimulation.

quests.title: Open Window for Bird Watching
quests.description: Allow access to the window ledge for prime bird surveillance.

moodQuotes.Sleeping: Zzz... Do not disturb. Consequences will be severe.
moodQuotes.Ecstatic: Fine. You may pet me. BRIEFLY. Do not read into this.
moodQuotes.Happy: You may proceed. I am... temporarily satisfied.
moodQuotes.Neutral: This is taking far too long. My patience wears thin, human.
moodQuotes.Neglected: UNACCEPTABLE. The litter box remains unattended. Consequences incoming.
moodQuotes.Sad: You call that a play session? I've seen dust motes with more energy.
